mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_fire_plan WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY plan_date ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_fire_plan WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_fire_plan WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_fire_plan (plan_type, law_basis, cycle, plan_date, org, target, cost, status, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{planType}, #{lawBasis}, #{cycle}, #{planDate,jdbcType=DATE}, #{org}, #{target}, #{cost}, #{status}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_fire_plan SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
